executives.name: Christina Lampe-Önnerud
executives.background: Dr. Lampe-Önnerud has served as a director since 2020. She is the founder and CEO of Cadenza Innovation, Inc. and was the founder of Boston-Power, Inc.

executives.name: Gilberto Antoniazzi
executives.background: Mr. Antoniazzi has served as our Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since May 2018. Prior to joining Livent, he was Chief Financial Officer for FMC Agricultural Solutions from 2013 to 2018. He held various financial and management roles at FMC since 1993.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Robert Pallash
executives.background: Mr. Pallash has served as a director since 2018. He was formerly President, Global Customer Group and Senior Vice President of Visteon Corporation.
